section_name: Preemption of additional fees, fines, surcharges, and costs
text: Notwithstanding any general or special law, or municipal or county ordinance, additional fees, fines, surcharges, or costs other than the court costs and surcharges assessed under s. 318.18 (12), (14), (19), (20), and (23) may not be added to the civil traffic penalties assessed under this chapter.
markdown:
### Chapter 318. Disposition of Traffic Infractions
##### § 318.121 — Preemption of additional fees, fines, surcharges, and costs

Notwithstanding any general or special law, or municipal or county ordinance, additional fees, fines, surcharges, or costs other than the court costs and surcharges assessed under s. 318.18 (12), (14), (19), (20), and (23) may not be added to the civil traffic penalties assessed under this chapter.

subsections.text: Notwithstanding any general or special law, or municipal or county ordinance, additional fees, fines, surcharges, or costs other than the court costs and surcharges assessed under s. 318.18 (12), (14), (19), (20), and (23) may not be added to the civil traffic penalties assessed under this chapter.
